https://kubernetes.io/docs/concepts/configuration/manage-resources-containers/"},{"id":"field-nvidia-com-v1beta1-spec-podtemplate-spec-volumes-ephemeral-volumeclaimtemplate-spec-resources-limits-key","path":"spec.podTemplate.spec.volumes[].ephemeral.volumeClaimTemplate.spec.resources.limits.<key>","type":"int-or-string","required":false,"metadata":["pattern: describes the minimum amount of compute resources required.\nIf Requests is omitted for a container, it defaults to Limits if that is explicitly specified,\notherwise to an implementation-defined value. Requests cannot exceed Limits.\nMore info: https://kubernetes.io/docs/concepts/configuration/manage-resources-containers/"},{"id":"field-nvidia-com-v1beta1-spec-podtemplate-spec-volumes-ephemeral-volumeclaimtemplate-spec-resources-requests-key","path":"spec.podTemplate.spec.volumes[].ephemeral.volumeClaimTemplate.spec.resources.requests.<key>","type":"int-or-string","required":false,"metadata":["pattern: ^(\\+|-)?(([0-9]+(\\.[0-9]*)?)|(\\.[0-9]+))(([KMGTPE]i)|[numkMGTPE]|([eE](\\+|-)?(([0-9]+(\\.[0-9]*)?)|(\\.[0-9]+))))?$","x-kubernetes-int-or-string"]},{"id":"field-nvidia-com-v1beta1-spec-podtemplate-spec-volumes-ephemeral-volumeclaimtemplate-spec-selector","path":"spec.podTemplate.spec.volumes[].ephemeral.volumeClaimTemplate.spec.selector","type":"object","required":false,"description":"selector is a label query over volumes to consider for binding.","metadata":["x-kubernetes-map-type: atomic"]},{"id":"field-nvidia-com-v1beta1-spec-podtemplate-spec-volumes-ephemeral-volumeclaimtemplate-spec-selector-matchexpressions","path":"spec.podTemplate.spec.volumes[].ephemeral.volumeClaimTemplate.spec.selector.matchExpressions","type":"array<object>","required":false,"description":"matchExpressions is a list of label selector requirements. The requirements are ANDed.","metadata":["x-kubernetes-list-type: atomic"]},{"id":"field-nvidia-com-v1beta1-spec-podtemplate-spec-volumes-ephemeral-volumeclaimtemplate-spec-selector-matchexpressions-key","path":"spec.podTemplate.spec.volumes[].ephemeral.volumeClaimTemplate.spec.selector.matchExpressions[].key","type":"string","required":true,"description":"key is the label key that the selector applies to."},{"id":"field-nvidia-com-v1beta1-spec-podtemplate-spec-volumes-ephemeral-volumeclaimtemplate-spec-selector-matchexpressions-operator","path":"spec.podTemplate.spec.volumes[].ephemeral.volumeClaimTemplate.spec.selector.matchExpressions[].operator","type":"string","required":true,"description":"operator represents a key's relationship to a set of values.\nValid operators are In, NotIn, Exists and DoesNotExist."},{"id":"field-nvidia-com-v1beta1-spec-podtemplate-spec-volumes-ephemeral-volumeclaimtemplate-spec-selector-matchexpressions-values","path":"spec.podTemplate.spec.volumes[].ephemeral.volumeClaimTemplate.spec.selector.matchExpressions[].values","type":"array<string>","required":false,"description":"values is an array of string values. If the operator is In or NotIn,\nthe values array must be non-empty. If the operator is Exists or DoesNotExist,\nthe values array must be empty. This array is replaced during a strategic\nmerge patch.","metadata":["x-kubernetes-list-type: atomic"]},{"id":"field-nvidia-com-v1beta1-spec-podtemplate-spec-volumes-ephemeral-volumeclaimtemplate-spec-selector-matchexpressions-values","path":"spec.podTemplate.spec.volumes[].ephemeral.volumeClaimTemplate.spec.selector.matchExpressions[].values[]","type":"string","required":true},{"id":"field-nvidia-com-v1beta1-spec-podtemplate-spec-volumes-ephemeral-volumeclaimtemplate-spec-selector-matchlabels","path":"spec.podTemplate.spec.volumes[].ephemeral.volumeClaimTemplate.spec.selector.matchLabels","type":"object","required":false,"description":"matchLabels is a map of {key,value} pairs. A single {key,value} in the matchLabels\nmap is equivalent to an element of matchExpressions, whose key field is \"key\", the\noperator is \"In\", and the values array contains only \"value\". The requirements are ANDed."},{"id":"field-nvidia-com-v1beta1-spec-podtemplate-spec-volumes-ephemeral-volumeclaimtemplate-spec-selector-matchlabels-key","path":"spec.podTemplate.spec.volumes[].ephemeral.volumeClaimTemplate.spec.selector.matchLabels.<key>","type":"string","required":false},{"id":"field-nvidia-com-v1beta1-spec-podtemplate-spec-volumes-ephemeral-volumeclaimtemplate-spec-storageclassname","path":"spec.podTemplate.spec.volumes[].ephemeral.volumeClaimTemplate.spec.storageClassName","type":"string","required":false,"description":"storageClassName is the name of the StorageClass required by the claim.\nMore info: https://kubernetes.io/docs/concepts/storage/persistent-volumes#class-1"},{"id":"field-nvidia-com-v1beta1-spec-podtemplate-spec-volumes-ephemeral-volumeclaimtemplate-spec-volumeattributesclassname","path":"spec.podTemplate.spec.volumes[].ephemeral.volumeClaimTemplate.spec.volumeAttributesClassName","type":"string","required":false,"description":"volumeAttributesClassName may be used to set the VolumeAttributesClass used by this claim.\nIf specified, the CSI driver will create or update the volume with the attributes defined\nin the corresponding VolumeAttributesClass. This has a different purpose than storageClassName,\nit can be changed after the claim is created. An empty string or nil value indicates that no\nVolumeAttributesClass will be applied to the claim. If the claim enters an Infeasible error state,\nthis field can be reset to its previous value (including nil) to cancel the modification.\nIf the resource referred to by volumeAttributesClass does not exist, this PersistentVolumeClaim will be\nset to a Pending state, as reflected by the modifyVolumeStatus field, until such as a resource\nexists.\nMore info: https://kubernetes.io/docs/concepts/storage/volume-attributes-classes/"},{"id":"field-nvidia-com-v1beta1-spec-podtemplate-spec-volumes-ephemeral-volumeclaimtemplate-spec-volumemode","path":"spec.podTemplate.spec.volumes[].ephemeral.volumeClaimTemplate.spec.volumeMode","type":"string","required":false,"description":"volumeMode defines what type of volume is required by the claim.\nValue of Filesystem is implied when not included in claim spec."},{"id":"field-nvidia-com-v1beta1-spec-podtemplate-spec-volumes-ephemeral-volumeclaimtemplate-spec-volumename","path":"spec.podTemplate.spec.volumes[].ephemeral.volumeClaimTemplate.spec.volumeName","type":"string","required":false,"description":"volumeName is the binding reference to the PersistentVolume backing this claim."},{"id":"field-nvidia-com-v1beta1-spec-podtemplate-spec-volumes-fc","path":"spec.podTemplate.spec.volumes[].fc","type":"object","required":false,"description":"fc represents a Fibre Channel resource that is attached to a kubelet's host machine and then exposed to the pod."},{"id":"field-nvidia-com-v1beta1-spec-podtemplate-spec-volumes-fc-fstype","path":"spec.podTemplate.spec.volumes[].fc.fsType","type":"string","required":false,"description":"fsType is the filesystem type to mount.\nMust be a filesystem type supported by the host operating system.\nEx. \"ext4\", \"xfs\", \"ntfs\". If the secret object\ncontains more than one secret, all secrets are passed to the plugin\nscripts.","metadata":["x-kubernetes-map-type: atomic"]},{"id":"field-nvidia-com-v1beta1-spec-podtemplate-spec-volumes-flexvolume-secretref-name","path":"spec.podTemplate.spec.volumes[].flexVolume.secretRef.name","type":"string","required":false,"description":"Name of the referent.\nThis field is effectively required, but due to backwards compatibility is\nallowed to be empty. This is unique identifier of a Flocker dataset"},{"id":"field-nvidia-com-v1beta1-spec-podtemplate-spec-volumes-gcepersistentdisk","path":"spec.podTemplate.spec.volumes[].gcePersistentDisk","type":"object","required":false,"description":"gcePersistentDisk represents a GCE Disk resource that is attached to a\nkubelet's host machine and then exposed to the pod.\nDeprecated: GCEPersistentDisk is deprecated. All operations for the in-tree\ngcePersistentDisk type are redirected to the pd.csi.storage.gke.io CSI driver.\nMore info: https://kubernetes.io/docs/concepts/storage/volumes#gcepersistentdisk","metadata":["requiredFields: pdName"]},{"id":"field-nvidia-com-v1beta1-spec-podtemplate-spec-volumes-gcepersistentdisk-fstype","path":"spec.podTemplate.spec.volumes[].gcePersistentDisk.fsType","type":"string","required":false,"description":"fsType is filesystem type of the volume that you want to mount.\nTip: Ensure that the filesystem type is supported by the host operating system.\nExamples: \"ext4\", \"xfs\", \"ntfs\". Implicitly inferred to be \"ext4\" if unspecified.\nMore info: https://kubernetes.io/docs/concepts/storage/volumes#gcepersistentdisk"},{"id":"field-nvidia-com-v1beta1-spec-podtemplate-spec-volumes-gcepersistentdisk-partition","path":"spec.podTemplate.spec.volumes[].gcePersistentDisk.partition","type":"integer/int32","required":false,"description":"partition is the partition in the volume that you want to mount.\nIf omitted, the default is to mount by volume name.\nExamples: For volume /dev/sda1, you specify the partition as \"1\".\nSimilarly, the volume partition for /dev/sda is \"0\" (or you can leave the property empty).\nMore info: https://kubernetes.io/docs/concepts/storage/volumes#gcepersistentdisk","metadata":["format: int32"]},{"id":"field-nvidia-com-v1beta1-spec-podtemplate-spec-volumes-gcepersistentdisk-pdname","path":"spec.podTemplate.spec.volumes[].gcePersistentDisk.pdName","type":"string","required":true,"description":"pdName is unique name of the PD resource in GCE. Used to identify the disk in GCE.\nMore info: https://kubernetes.io/docs/concepts/storage/volumes#gcepersistentdisk"},{"id":"field-nvidia-com-v1beta1-spec-podtemplate-spec-volumes-gcepersistentdisk-readonly","path":"spec.podTemplate.spec.volumes[].gcePersistentDisk.readOnly","type":"boolean","required":false,"description":"readOnly here will force the ReadOnly setting in VolumeMounts.\nDefaults to false.\nMore info: https://kubernetes.io/docs/concepts/storage/volumes#gcepersistentdisk"},{"id":"field-nvidia-com-v1beta1-spec-podtemplate-spec-volumes-gitrepo","path":"spec.podTemplate.spec.volumes[].gitRepo","type":"object","required":false,"description":"gitRepo represents a git repository at a particular revision.\nDeprecated: GitRepo is deprecated. To provision a container with a git repo, mount an\nEmptyDir into an InitContainer that clones the repo using git, then mount the EmptyDir\ninto the Pod's container.","metadata":["requiredFields: repository"]},{"id":"field-nvidia-com-v1beta1-spec-podtemplate-spec-volumes-gitrepo-directory","path":"spec.podTemplate.spec.volumes[].gitRepo.directory","type":"string","required":false,"description":"directory is the target directory name.\nMust not contain or start with '..'.  If '.' is supplied, the volume directory will be the\ngit repository.  Otherwise, if specified, the volume will contain the git repository in\nthe subdirectory with the given name."},{"id":"field-nvidia-com-v1beta1-spec-podtemplate-spec-volumes-gitrepo-repository","path":"spec.podTemplate.spec.volumes[].gitRepo.repository","type":"string","required":true,"description":"repository is the URL"},{"id":"field-nvidia-com-v1beta1-spec-podtemplate-spec-volumes-gitrepo-revision","path":"spec.podTemplate.spec.volumes[].gitRepo.revision","type":"string","required":false,"description":"revision is the commit hash for the specified revision."},{"id":"field-nvidia-com-v1beta1-spec-podtemplate-spec-volumes-glusterfs","path":"spec.podTemplate.spec.volumes[].glusterfs","type":"object","required":false,"description":"glusterfs represents a Glusterfs mount on the host that shares a pod's lifetime.\nDeprecated: Glusterfs is deprecated and the in-tree glusterfs type is no longer supported.","metadata":["requiredFields: endpoints, path"]},{"id":"field-nvidia-com-v1beta1-spec-podtemplate-spec-volumes-glusterfs-endpoints","path":"spec.podTemplate.spec.volumes[].glusterfs.endpoints","type":"string","required":true,"description":"endpoints is the endpoint name that details Glusterfs topology."},{"id":"field-nvidia-com-v1beta1-spec-podtemplate-spec-volumes-glusterfs-path","path":"spec.podTemplate.spec.volumes[].glusterfs.path","type":"string","required":true,"description":"path is the Glusterfs volume path.\nMore info: https://examples.k8s.io/volumes/glusterfs/README.md#create-a-pod"},{"id":"field-nvidia-com-v1beta1-spec-podtemplate-spec-volumes-glusterfs-readonly","path":"spec.podTemplate.spec.volumes[].glusterfs.readOnly","type":"boolean","required":false,"description":"readOnly here will force the Glusterfs volume to be mounted with read-only permissions.\nDefaults to false.\nMore info: https://examples.k8s.io/volumes/glusterfs/README.md#create-a-pod"},{"id":"field-nvidia-com-v1beta1-spec-podtemplate-spec-volumes-hostpath","path":"spec.podTemplate.spec.volumes[].hostPath","type":"object","required":false,"description":"hostPath represents a pre-existing file or directory on the host\nmachine that is directly exposed to the container. This is generally\nused for system agents or other privileged things that are allowed\nto see the host machine. Most containers will NOT need this.\nMore info: https://kubernetes.io/docs/concepts/storage/volumes#hostpath","metadata":["requiredFields: path"]},{"id":"field-nvidia-com-v1beta1-spec-podtemplate-spec-volumes-hostpath-path","path":"spec.podTemplate.spec.volumes[].hostPath.path","type":"string","required":true,"description":"path of the directory on the host.\nIf the path is a symlink, it will follow the link to the real path.\nMore info: https://kubernetes.io/docs/concepts/storage/volumes#hostpath"},{"id":"field-nvidia-com-v1beta1-spec-podtemplate-spec-volumes-hostpath-type","path":"spec.podTemplate.spec.volumes[].hostPath.type","type":"string","required":false,"description":"type for HostPath Volume\nDefaults to \"\"\nMore info: https://kubernetes.io/docs/concepts/storage/volumes#hostpath"},{"id":"field-nvidia-com-v1beta1-spec-podtemplate-spec-volumes-image","path":"spec.podTemplate.spec.volumes[].image","type":"object","required":false,"description":"image represents an OCI object (a container image or artifact) pulled and mounted on the kubelet's host machine.\nThe volume is resolved at pod startup depending on which PullPolicy value is provided:\n\n- Always: the kubelet always attempts to pull the reference. Container creation will fail If the pull fails.\n- Never: the kubelet never pulls the reference and only uses a local image or artifact. Container creation will fail if the reference isn't present.\n- IfNotPresent: the kubelet pulls if the reference isn't already present on disk. Container creation will fail if the reference isn't present and the pull fails.\n\nThe volume gets re-resolved if the pod gets deleted and recreated, which means that new remote content will become available on pod recreation.\nA failure to resolve or pull the image during pod startup will block containers from starting and may add significant latency. Failures will be retried using normal volume backoff and will be reported on the pod reason and message.\nThe types of objects that may be mounted by this volume are defined by the container runtime implementation on a host machine and at minimum must include all valid types supported by the container image field.\nThe OCI object gets mounted in a single directory (spec.containers[*].volumeMounts.mountPath) by merging the manifest layers in the same way as for container images.\nThe volume will be mounted read-only (ro) and non-executable files (noexec).\nSub path mounts for containers are not supported (spec.containers[*].volumeMounts.subpath) before 1.33.\nThe field spec.securityContext.fsGroupChangePolicy has no effect on this volume type."},{"id":"field-nvidia-com-v1beta1-spec-podtemplate-spec-volumes-image-pullpolicy","path":"spec.podTemplate.spec.volumes[].image.pullPolicy","type":"string","required":false,"description":"Policy for pulling OCI objects. Possible values are:\nAlways: the kubelet always attempts to pull the reference. Container creation will fail If the pull fails.\nNever: the kubelet never pulls the reference and only uses a local image or artifact. Container creation will fail if the reference isn't present.\nIfNotPresent: the kubelet pulls if the reference isn't already present on disk. Container creation will fail if the reference isn't present and the pull fails.\nDefaults to Always if :latest tag is specified, or IfNotPresent otherwise."},{"id":"field-nvidia-com-v1beta1-spec-podtemplate-spec-volumes-image-reference","path":"spec.podTemplate.spec.volumes[].image.reference","type":"string","required":false,"description":"Required: Image or artifact reference to be used.\nBehaves in the same way as pod.spec.containers[*].image.\nPull secrets will be assembled in the same way as for the container image by looking up node credentials, SA image pull secrets, and pod spec image pull secrets.\nMore info: https://kubernetes.io/docs/concepts/containers/images\nThis field is optional to allow higher level config management to default or override\ncontainer images in workload controllers like Deployments and StatefulSets."},{"id":"field-nvidia-com-v1beta1-spec-podtemplate-spec-volumes-iscsi","path":"spec.podTemplate.spec.volumes[].iscsi","type":"object","required":false,"description":"iscsi represents an ISCSI Disk resource that is attached to a\nkubelet's host machine and then exposed to the pod.\nMore info: https://kubernetes.io/docs/concepts/storage/volumes/#iscsi","metadata":["requiredFields: iqn, lun, targetPortal"]},{"id":"field-nvidia-com-v1beta1-spec-podtemplate-spec-volumes-iscsi-chapauthdiscovery","path":"spec.podTemplate.spec.volumes[].iscsi.chapAuthDiscovery","type":"boolean","required":false,"description":"chapAuthDiscovery defines whether support iSCSI Discovery CHAP authentication"},{"id":"field-nvidia-com-v1beta1-spec-podtemplate-spec-volumes-iscsi-chapauthsession","path":"spec.podTemplate.spec.volumes[].iscsi.chapAuthSession","type":"boolean","required":false,"description":"chapAuthSession defines whether support iSCSI Session CHAP authentication"},{"id":"field-nvidia-com-v1beta1-spec-podtemplate-spec-volumes-iscsi-fstype","path":"spec.podTemplate.spec.volumes[].iscsi.fsType","type":"string","required":false,"description":"fsType is the filesystem type of the volume that you want to mount.\nTip: Ensure that the filesystem type is supported by the host operating system.\nExamples: \"ext4\", \"xfs\", \"ntfs\". Implicitly inferred to be \"ext4\" if unspecified.\nMore info: https://kubernetes.io/docs/concepts/storage/volumes#iscsi"},{"id":"field-nvidia-com-v1beta1-spec-podtemplate-spec-volumes-iscsi-initiatorname","path":"spec.podTemplate.spec.volumes[].iscsi.initiatorName","type":"string","required":false,"description":"initiatorName is the custom iSCSI Initiator Name.\nIf initiatorName is specified with iscsiInterface simultaneously, new iSCSI interface\n<target portal>:<volume name> will be created for the connection."},{"id":"field-nvidia-com-v1beta1-spec-podtemplate-spec-volumes-iscsi-iqn","path":"spec.podTemplate.spec.volumes[].iscsi.iqn","type":"string","required":true,"description":"iqn is the target iSCSI Qualified Name."},{"id":"field-nvidia-com-v1beta1-spec-podtemplate-spec-volumes-iscsi-iscsiinterface","path":"spec.podTemplate.spec.volumes[].iscsi.iscsiInterface","type":"string","required":false,"description":"iscsiInterface is the interface Name that uses an iSCSI transport.\nDefaults to 'default' (tcp).","metadata":["default: \"default\""]},{"id":"field-nvidia-com-v1beta1-spec-podtemplate-spec-volumes-iscsi-lun","path":"spec.podTemplate.spec.volumes[].iscsi.lun","type":"integer/int32","required":true,"description":"lun represents iSCSI Target Lun number.","metadata":["format: int32"]},{"id":"field-nvidia-com-v1beta1-spec-podtemplate-spec-volumes-iscsi-portals","path":"spec.podTemplate.spec.volumes[].iscsi.portals","type":"array<string>","required":false,"description":"portals is the iSCSI Target Portal List. Each entry in this list\nhandles one source.","metadata":["x-kubernetes-list-type: atomic"]},{"id":"field-nvidia-com-v1beta1-spec-podtemplate-spec-volumes-projected-sources-clustertrustbundle","path":"spec.podTemplate.spec.volumes[].projected.sources[].clusterTrustBundle","type":"object","required":false,"description":"ClusterTrustBundle allows a pod to access the `.spec.trustBundle` field\nof ClusterTrustBundle objects in an auto-updating file.\n\nAlpha, gated by the ClusterTrustBundleProjection feature gate.\n\nClusterTrustBundle objects can either be selected by name, or by the\ncombination of signer name and a label selector.\n\nKubelet performs aggressive normalization of the PEM contents written\ninto the pod filesystem.  Esoteric PEM features such as inter-block\ncomments and block headers are stripped.  Certificates are deduplicated.\nThe ordering of certificates within the file is arbitrary, and Kubelet\nmay change the order over time.","metadata":["requiredFields: path"]},{"id":"field-nvidia-com-v1beta1-spec-podtemplate-spec-volumes-projected-sources-clustertrustbundle-labelselector","path":"spec.podTemplate.spec.volumes[].projected.sources[].clusterTrustBundle.labelSelector","type":"object","required":false,"description":"Select all ClusterTrustBundles that match this label selector.  Only has\neffect if signerName is set.  Mutually-exclusive with name.  If unset,\ninterpreted as \"match nothing\".  If set but empty, interpreted as \"match\neverything\".","metadata":["x-kubernetes-map-type: atomic"]},{"id":"field-nvidia-com-v1beta1-spec-podtemplate-spec-volumes-projected-sources-clustertrustbundle-labelselector-matchexpressions","path":"spec.podTemplate.spec.volumes[].projected.sources[].clusterTrustBundle.labelSelector.matchExpressions","type":"array<object>","required":false,"description":"matchExpressions is a list of label selector requirements. The requirements are ANDed.","metadata":["x-kubernetes-list-type: atomic"]},{"id":"field-nvidia-com-v1beta1-spec-podtemplate-spec-volumes-projected-sources-clustertrustbundle-labelselector-matchexpressions-key","path":"spec.podTemplate.spec.volumes[].projected.sources[].clusterTrustBundle.labelSelector.matchExpressions[].key","type":"string","required":true,"description":"key is the label key that the selector applies to."},{"id":"field-nvidia-com-v1beta1-spec-podtemplate-spec-volumes-projected-sources-clustertrustbundle-labelselector-matchexpressions-operator","path":"spec.podTemplate.spec.volumes[].projected.sources[].clusterTrustBundle.labelSelector.matchExpressions[].operator","type":"string","required":true,"description":"operator represents a key's relationship to a set of values.\nValid operators are In, NotIn, Exists and DoesNotExist."},{"id":"field-nvidia-com-v1beta1-spec-podtemplate-spec-volumes-projected-sources-clustertrustbundle-labelselector-matchexpressions-values","path":"spec.podTemplate.spec.volumes[].projected.sources[].clusterTrustBundle.labelSelector.matchExpressions[].values","type":"array<string>","required":false,"description":"values is an array of string values. If the operator is In or NotIn,\nthe values array must be non-empty. If the operator is Exists or DoesNotExist,\nthe values array must be empty. This array is replaced during a strategic\nmerge patch.","metadata":["x-kubernetes-list-type: atomic"]},{"id":"field-nvidia-com-v1beta1-spec-podtemplate-spec-volumes-projected-sources-clustertrustbundle-labelselector-matchexpressions-values","path":"spec.podTemplate.spec.volumes[].projected.sources[].clusterTrustBundle.labelSelector.matchExpressions[].values[]","type":"string","required":true},{"id":"field-nvidia-com-v1beta1-spec-podtemplate-spec-volumes-projected-sources-clustertrustbundle-labelselector-matchlabels","path":"spec.podTemplate.spec.volumes[].projected.sources[].clusterTrustBundle.labelSelector.matchLabels","type":"object","required":false,"description":"matchLabels is a map of {key,value} pairs. A single {key,value} in the matchLabels\nmap is equivalent to an element of matchExpressions, whose key field is \"key\", the\noperator is \"In\", and the values array contains only \"value\". The requirements are ANDed."},{"id":"field-nvidia-com-v1beta1-spec-podtemplate-spec-volumes-projected-sources-clustertrustbundle-labelselector-matchlabels-key","path":"spec.podTemplate.spec.volumes[].projected.sources[].clusterTrustBundle.labelSelector.matchLabels.<key>","type":"string","required":false},{"id":"field-nvidia-com-v1beta1-spec-podtemplate-spec-volumes-projected-sources-clustertrustbundle-name","path":"spec.podTemplate.spec.volumes[].projected.sources[].clusterTrustBundle.name","type":"string","required":false,"description":"Select a single ClusterTrustBundle by object name.  Mutually-exclusive\nwith signerName and labelSelector."},{"id":"field-nvidia-com-v1beta1-spec-podtemplate-spec-volumes-projected-sources-clustertrustbundle-optional","path":"spec.podTemplate.spec.volumes[].projected.sources[].clusterTrustBundle.optional","type":"boolean","required":false,"description":"If true, don't block pod startup if the referenced ClusterTrustBundle(s)\naren't available.  If using name, then the named ClusterTrustBundle is\nallowed not to exist.  If using signerName, then the combination of\nsignerName and labelSelector is allowed to match zero\nClusterTrustBundles."},{"id":"field-nvidia-com-v1beta1-spec-podtemplate-spec-volumes-projected-sources-clustertrustbundle-path","path":"spec.podTemplate.spec.volumes[].projected.sources[].clusterTrustBundle.path","type":"string","required":true,"description":"Relative path from the volume root to write the bundle."},{"id":"field-nvidia-com-v1beta1-spec-podtemplate-spec-volumes-projected-sources-clustertrustbundle-signername","path":"spec.podTemplate.spec.volumes[].projected.sources[].clusterTrustBundle.signerName","type":"string","required":false,"description":"Select all ClusterTrustBundles that match this signer name.\nMutually-exclusive with name.  The contents of all selected\nClusterTrustBundles will be unified and deduplicated."},{"id":"field-nvidia-com-v1beta1-spec-podtemplate-spec-volumes-projected-sources-configmap","path":"spec.podTemplate.spec.volumes[].projected.sources[].configMap","type":"object","required":false,"description":"configMap information about the configMap data to project","metadata":["x-kubernetes-map-type: atomic"]},{"id":"field-nvidia-com-v1beta1-spec-podtemplate-spec-volumes-projected-sources-configmap-items","path":"spec.podTemplate.spec.volumes[].projected.sources[].configMap.items","type":"array<object>","required":false,"description":"items if unspecified, each key-value pair in the Data field of the referenced\nConfigMap will be projected into the volume as a file whose name is the\nkey and content is the value. If specified, the listed keys will be\nprojected into the specified paths, and unlisted keys will not be\npresent. If a key is specified which is not present in the ConfigMap,\nthe volume setup will error unless it is marked optional. Paths must be\nrelative and may not contain the '..' path or start with '..'.","metadata":["x-kubernetes-list-type: atomic"]},{"id":"field-nvidia-com-v1beta1-spec-podtemplate-spec-volumes-projected-sources-configmap-items-key","path":"spec.podTemplate.spec.volumes[].projected.sources[].configMap.items[].key","type":"string","required":true,"description":"key is the key to project."},{"id":"field-nvidia-com-v1beta1-spec-podtemplate-spec-volumes-projected-sources-configmap-items-mode","path":"spec.podTemplate.spec.volumes[].projected.sources[].configMap.items[].mode","type":"integer/int32","required":false,"description":"mode is Optional: mode bits used to set permissions on this file.\nMust be an octal value between 0000 and 0777 or a decimal value between 0 and 511.\nYAML accepts both octal and decimal values, JSON requires decimal values for mode bits.\nIf not specified, the volume defaultMode will be used.\nThis might be in conflict with other options that affect the file\nmode, like fsGroup, and the result can be other mode bits set.","metadata":["format: int32"]},{"id":"field-nvidia-com-v1beta1-spec-podtemplate-spec-volumes-projected-sources-configmap-items-path","path":"spec.podTemplate.spec.volumes[].projected.sources[].configMap.items[].path","type":"string","required":true,"description":"path is the relative path of the file to map the key to.\nMay not be an absolute path.\nMay not contain the path element '..'.\nMay not start with the string '..'."},{"id":"field-nvidia-com-v1beta1-spec-podtemplate-spec-volumes-projected-sources-configmap-name","path":"spec.podTemplate.spec.volumes[].projected.sources[].configMap.name","type":"string","required":false,"description":"Name of the referent.\nThis field is effectively required, but due to backwards compatibility is\nallowed to be empty. name: required for volumes, optional for env vars"},{"id":"field-nvidia-com-v1beta1-spec-podtemplate-spec-volumes-projected-sources-downwardapi-items-resourcefieldref-divisor","path":"spec.podTemplate.spec.volumes[].projected.sources[].downwardAPI.items[].resourceFieldRef.divisor","type":"int-or-string","required":false,"description":"Specifies the output format of the exposed resources, defaults to \"1\"","metadata":["pattern: ^(\\+|-)?(([0-9]+(\\.[0-9]*)?)|(\\.[0-9]+))(([KMGTPE]i)|[numkMGTPE]|([eE](\\+|-)?(([0-9]+(\\.[0-9]*)?)|(\\.[0-9]+))))?$","x-kubernetes-int-or-string"]},{"id":"field-nvidia-com-v1beta1-spec-podtemplate-spec-volumes-projected-sources-downwardapi-items-resourcefieldref-resource","path":"spec.podTemplate.spec.volumes[].projected.sources[].downwardAPI.items[].resourceFieldRef.resource","type":"string","required":true,"description":"Required: resource to select"},{"id":"field-nvidia-com-v1beta1-spec-podtemplate-spec-volumes-projected-sources-podcertificate","path":"spec.podTemplate.spec.volumes[].projected.sources[].podCertificate","type":"object","required":false,"description":"Projects an auto-rotating credential bundle (private key and certificate\nchain) that the pod can use either as a TLS client or server.\n\nKubelet generates a private key and uses it to send a\nPodCertificateRequest to the named signer.  Once the signer approves the\nrequest and issues a certificate chain, Kubelet writes the key and\ncertificate chain to the pod filesystem.  The pod does not start until\ncertificates have been issued for each podCertificate projected volume\nsource in its spec.\n\nKubelet will begin trying to rotate the certificate at the time indicated\nby the signer using the PodCertificateRequest.Status.BeginRefreshAt\ntimestamp.\n\nKubelet can write a single file, indicated by the credentialBundlePath\nfield, or separate files, indicated by the keyPath and\ncertificateChainPath fields.\n\nThe credential bundle is a single file in PEM format.  The first PEM\nentry is the private key (in PKCS#8 format), and the remaining PEM\nentries are the certificate chain issued by the signer (typically,\nsigners will return their certificate chain in leaf-to-root order).\n\nPrefer using the credential bundle format, since your application code\ncan read it atomically.  If you use keyPath and certificateChainPath,\nyour application must make two separate file reads. If these coincide\nwith a certificate rotation, it is possible that the private key and leaf\ncertificate you read may not correspond to each other.  Your application\nwill need to check for this condition, and re-read until they are\nconsistent.\n\nThe named signer controls chooses the format of the certificate it\nissues; consult the signer implementation's documentation to learn how to\nuse the certificates it issues.","metadata":["requiredFields: keyType, signerName"]},{"id":"field-nvidia-com-v1beta1-spec-podtemplate-spec-volumes-projected-sources-podcertificate-certificatechainpath","path":"spec.podTemplate.spec.volumes[].projected.sources[].podCertificate.certificateChainPath","type":"string","required":false,"description":"Write the certificate chain at this path in the projected volume.\n\nMost applications should use credentialBundlePath.  When using keyPath\nand certificateChainPath, your application needs to check that the key\nand leaf certificate are consistent, because it is possible to read the\nfiles mid-rotation."},{"id":"field-nvidia-com-v1beta1-spec-podtemplate-spec-volumes-projected-sources-podcertificate-credentialbundlepath","path":"spec.podTemplate.spec.volumes[].projected.sources[].podCertificate.credentialBundlePath","type":"string","required":false,"description":"Write the credential bundle at this path in the projected volume.\n\nThe credential bundle is a single file that contains multiple PEM blocks.\nThe first PEM block is a PRIVATE KEY block, containing a PKCS#8 private\nkey.\n\nThe remaining blocks are CERTIFICATE blocks, containing the issued\ncertificate chain from the signer (leaf and any intermediates).\n\nUsing credentialBundlePath lets your Pod's application code make a single\natomic read that retrieves a consistent key and certificate chain.  If you\nproject them to separate files, your application code will need to\nadditionally check that the leaf certificate was issued to the key."},{"id":"field-nvidia-com-v1beta1-spec-podtemplate-spec-volumes-projected-sources-podcertificate-keypath","path":"spec.podTemplate.spec.volumes[].projected.sources[].podCertificate.keyPath","type":"string","required":false,"description":"Write the key at this path in the projected volume.\n\nMost applications should use credentialBundlePath.  When using keyPath\nand certificateChainPath, your application needs to check that the key\nand leaf certificate are consistent, because it is possible to read the\nfiles mid-rotation."},{"id":"field-nvidia-com-v1beta1-spec-podtemplate-spec-volumes-projected-sources-podcertificate-keytype","path":"spec.podTemplate.spec.volumes[].projected.sources[].podCertificate.keyType","type":"string","required":true,"description":"The type of keypair Kubelet will generate for the pod.\n\nValid values are \"RSA3072\", \"RSA4096\", \"ECDSAP256\", \"ECDSAP384\",\n\"ECDSAP521\", and \"ED25519\"."},{"id":"field-nvidia-com-v1beta1-spec-podtemplate-spec-volumes-projected-sources-podcertificate-maxexpirationseconds","path":"spec.podTemplate.spec.volumes[].projected.sources[].podCertificate.maxExpirationSeconds","type":"integer/int32","required":false,"description":"maxExpirationSeconds is the maximum lifetime permitted for the\ncertificate.\n\nKubelet copies this value verbatim into the PodCertificateRequests it\ngenerates for this projection.\n\nIf omitted, kube-apiserver will set it to 86400(24 hours). kube-apiserver\nwill reject values shorter than 3600 (1 hour).  The maximum allowable\nvalue is 7862400 (91 days).\n\nThe signer implementation is then free to issue a certificate with any\nlifetime *shorter* than MaxExpirationSeconds, but no shorter than 3600\nseconds (1 hour).  This constraint is enforced by kube-apiserver.\n`kubernetes.io` signers will never issue certificates with a lifetime\nlonger than 24 hours.","metadata":["format: int32"]},{"id":"field-nvidia-com-v1beta1-spec-podtemplate-spec-volumes-projected-sources-podcertificate-signername","path":"spec.podTemplate.spec.volumes[].projected.sources[].podCertificate.signerName","type":"string","required":true,"description":"Kubelet's generated CSRs will be addressed to this signer."},{"id":"field-nvidia-com-v1beta1-spec-podtemplate-spec-volumes-projected-sources-secret","path":"spec.podTemplate.spec.volumes[].projected.sources[].secret","type":"object","required":false,"description":"secret information about the secret data to project","metadata":["x-kubernetes-map-type: atomic"]},{"id":"field-nvidia-com-v1beta1-spec-podtemplate-spec-volumes-projected-sources-secret-items","path":"spec.podTemplate.spec.volumes[].projected.sources[].secret.items","type":"array<object>","required":false,"description":"items if unspecified, each key-value pair in the Data field of the referenced\nSecret will be projected into the volume as a file whose name is the\nkey and content is the value. If specified, the listed keys will be\nprojected into the specified paths, and unlisted keys will not be\npresent. If a key is specified which is not present in the Secret,\nthe volume setup will error unless it is marked optional. Paths must be\nrelative and may not contain the '..' path or start with '..'.","metadata":["x-kubernetes-list-type: atomic"]},{"id":"field-nvidia-com-v1beta1-spec-podtemplate-spec-volumes-projected-sources-secret-items-key","path":"spec.podTemplate.spec.volumes[].projected.sources[].secret.items[].key","type":"string","required":true,"description":"key is the key to project."},{"id":"field-nvidia-com-v1beta1-spec-podtemplate-spec-volumes-projected-sources-secret-items-mode","path":"spec.podTemplate.spec.volumes[].projected.sources[].secret.items[].mode","type":"integer/int32","required":false,"description":"mode is Optional: mode bits used to set permissions on this file.\nMust be an octal value between 0000 and 0777 or a decimal value between 0 and 511.\nYAML accepts both octal and decimal values, JSON requires decimal values for mode bits.\nIf not specified, the volume defaultMode will be used.\nThis might be in conflict with other options that affect the file\nmode, like fsGroup, and the result can be other mode bits set.","metadata":["format: int32"]},{"id":"field-nvidia-com-v1beta1-spec-podtemplate-spec-volumes-projected-sources-secret-items-path","path":"spec.podTemplate.spec.volumes[].projected.sources[].secret.items[].path","type":"string","required":true,"description":"path is the relative path of the file to map the key to.\nMay not be an absolute path.\nMay not contain the path element '..'.\nMay not start with the string '..'."},{"id":"field-nvidia-com-v1beta1-spec-podtemplate-spec-volumes-projected-sources-secret-name","path":"spec.podTemplate.spec.volumes[].projected.sources[].secret.name","type":"string","required":false,"description":"Name of the referent.\nThis field is effectively required, but due to backwards compatibility is\nallowed to be empty. Instances of this type with an empty value here are\nalmost certainly wrong.\nMore info: https://kubernetes.io/docs/concepts/overview/working-with-objects/names/#names","metadata":["default: \"\""]},{"id":"field-nvidia-com-v1beta1-spec-podtemplate-spec-volumes-projected-sources-secret-optional","path":"spec.podTemplate.spec.volumes[].projected.sources[].secret.optional","type":"boolean","required":false,"description":"optional field specify whether the Secret or its key must be defined"},{"id":"field-nvidia-com-v1beta1-spec-podtemplate-spec-volumes-projected-sources-serviceaccounttoken","path":"spec.podTemplate.spec.volumes[].projected.sources[].serviceAccountToken","type":"object","required":false,"description":"serviceAccountToken is information about the serviceAccountToken data to project","metadata":["requiredFields: path"]},{"id":"field-nvidia-com-v1beta1-spec-podtemplate-spec-volumes-projected-sources-serviceaccounttoken-audience","path":"spec.podTemplate.spec.volumes[].projected.sources[].serviceAccountToken.audience","type":"string","required":false,"description":"audience is the intended audience of the token. The audience defaults to the\nidentifier of the apiserver."},{"id":"field-nvidia-com-v1beta1-spec-podtemplate-spec-volumes-projected-sources-serviceaccounttoken-expirationseconds","path":"spec.podTemplate.spec.volumes[].projected.sources[].serviceAccountToken.expirationSeconds","type":"integer/int64","required":false,"description":"expirationSeconds is the requested duration of validity of the service\naccount token. As the token approaches expiration, the kubelet volume\nplugin will proactively rotate the service account token. The kubelet will\nstart trying to rotate the token if the token is older than 80 percent of\nits time to live or if the token is older than 24 hours.Defaults to 1 hour\nand must be at least 10 minutes.","metadata":["format: int64"]},{"id":"field-nvidia-com-v1beta1-spec-podtemplate-spec-volumes-projected-sources-serviceaccounttoken-path","path":"spec.podTemplate.spec.volumes[].projected.sources[].serviceAccountToken.path","type":"string","required":true,"description":"path When\n`scalingAdapter` is set on this component, this field is managed by\nthe DynamoGraphDeploymentScalingAdapter and should not be modified\ndirectly.","metadata":["format: int32","minimum: 0"]},{"id":"field-nvidia-com-v1beta1-spec-scalingadapter","path":"spec.scalingAdapter","type":"object","required":false,"description":"scalingAdapter opts this component into using the\nDynamoGraphDeploymentScalingAdapter. When set (even as an empty object,\n`scalingAdapter: {}`), a DGDSA is created and owns the `replicas` field\nso that external autoscalers (HPA/KEDA/Planner) can drive scaling via\nthe Scale subresource. Omit the field to opt out."},{"id":"field-nvidia-com-v1beta1-spec-sharedmemorysize","path":"spec.sharedMemorySize","type":"int-or-string","required":false,"description":"sharedMemorySize controls the size of the tmpfs mounted at `/dev/shm`.\n`nil` selects the operator default (8Gi), a positive quantity sets a\ncustom size, and `\"0\"` disables the shared-memory volume entirely.\nSimpler replacement for v1alpha1's `SharedMemorySpec` struct with its\n`disabled bool` + `size Quantity` pattern.","metadata":["pattern: ^(\\+|-)?(([0-9]+(\\.[0-9]*)?)|(\\.[0-9]+))(([KMGTPE]i)|[numkMGTPE]|([eE](\\+|-)?(([0-9]+(\\.[0-9]*)?)|(\\.[0-9]+))))?$","x-kubernetes-int-or-string"]},{"id":"field-nvidia-com-v1beta1-spec-topologyconstraint","path":"spec.topologyConstraint","type":"object","required":false,"description":"topologyConstraint applies to this component.\n`topologyConstraint.packDomain` is required. When both this and\n`spec.topologyConstraint.packDomain` are set, this field's `packDomain`\nmust be narrower than or equal to the spec-level value.","metadata":["requiredFields: packDomain"]},{"id":"field-nvidia-com-v1beta1-spec-topologyconstraint-packdomain","path":"spec.topologyConstraint.packDomain","type":"string","required":true,"description":"packDomain is the topology domain to pack pods within. Must match a\ndomain defined in the referenced ClusterTopology CR.","metadata":["pattern: ^[a-z0-9]([a-z0-9-]*[a-z0-9])?$"]},{"id":"field-nvidia-com-v1beta1-spec-type","path":"spec.type","type":"string","required":false,"description":"type indicates the role of this component within a Dynamo graph. Drives\nport mapping, frontend detection, planner RBAC, and the pod label\n`nvidia.com/dynamo-component-type`. Because `prefill` and `decode` are\nfirst-class values, users can set them directly.","metadata":["enum: \"frontend\" | \"worker\" | \"prefill\" | \"decode\" | \"planner\" | \"epp\""]},{"id":"field-nvidia-com-v1beta1-status","path":"status","type":"object","required":false,"description":"status reflects the current observed state of the component deployment."},{"id":"field-nvidia-com-v1beta1-status-component","path":"status.component","type":"object","required":false,"description":"component contains replica status information for this component.","metadata":["requiredFields: componentKind, replicas, updatedReplicas"]},{"id":"field-nvidia-com-v1beta1-status-component-availablereplicas","path":"status.component.availableReplicas","type":"integer/int32","required":false,"description":"availableReplicas is the number of available replicas. Populated for\n`Deployment` and `PodCliqueScalingGroup`; not available for\n`PodClique` or `LeaderWorkerSet`.","metadata":["format: int32","minimum: 0"]},{"id":"field-nvidia-com-v1beta1-status-component-componentkind","path":"status.component.componentKind","type":"string","required":true,"description":"componentKind is the underlying resource kind (e.g. `PodClique`,\n`Deployment`, `LeaderWorkerSet`).","metadata":["enum: \"PodClique\" | \"PodCliqueScalingGroup\" | \"Deployment\" | \"LeaderWorkerSet\""]},{"id":"field-nvidia-com-v1beta1-status-component-componentnames","path":"status.component.componentNames","type":"array<string>","required":false,"description":"componentNames is the list of underlying Kubernetes resource names for\nthis Dynamo component. Populated for\n`PodClique`, `Deployment`, and `LeaderWorkerSet`; not available for\n`PodCliqueScalingGroup`.","metadata":["format: int32","minimum: 0"]},{"id":"field-nvidia-com-v1beta1-status-component-replicas","path":"status.component.replicas","type":"integer/int32","required":true,"description":"replicas is the total number of non-terminated replicas.","metadata":["format: int32","minimum: 0"]},{"id":"field-nvidia-com-v1beta1-status-component-updatedreplicas","path":"status.component.updatedReplicas","type":"integer/int32","required":true,"description":"updatedReplicas is the number of replicas at the current/desired revision.","metadata":["format: int32","minimum: 0"]},{"id":"field-nvidia-com-v1beta1-status-conditions","path":"status.conditions","type":"array<object>","required":false,"description":"conditions captures the latest observed state of the component using\nstandard Kubernetes condition types (including `Available` and\n`DynamoComponentReady`).","metadata":["x-kubernetes-list-type: map","x-kubernetes-list-map-keys: type"]},{"id":"field-nvidia-com-v1beta1-status-conditions-lasttransitiontime","path":"status.conditions[].lastTransitionTime","type":"string/date-time","required":true,"description":"lastTransitionTime is the last time the condition transitioned from one status to another.\nThis should be when the underlying condition changed.  If that is not known, then using the time when the API field changed is acceptable.","metadata":["format: date-time"]},{"id":"field-nvidia-com-v1beta1-status-conditions-message","path":"status.conditions[].message","type":"string","required":true,"description":"message is a human readable message indicating details about the transition.\nThis may be an empty string.","metadata":["maxLength: 32768"]},{"id":"field-nvidia-com-v1beta1-status-conditions-observedgeneration","path":"status.conditions[].observedGeneration","type":"integer/int64","required":false,"description":"observedGeneration represents the .metadata.generation that the condition was set based upon.\nFor instance, if .metadata.generation is currently 12, but the .status.conditions[x].observedGeneration is 9, the condition is out of date\nwith respect to the current state of the instance.","metadata":["format: int64","minimum: 0"]},{"id":"field-nvidia-com-v1beta1-status-conditions-reason","path":"status.conditions[].reason","type":"string","required":true,"description":"reason contains a programmatic identifier indicating API.\nThe value should be a CamelCase string.\nThis field may not be empty.","metadata":["minLength: 1","maxLength: 1024","pattern: ^[A-Za-z]([A-Za-z0-9_,:]*[A-Za-z0-9_])?$"]},{"id":"field-nvidia-com-v1beta1-status-conditions-status","path":"status.conditions[].status","type":"string","required":true,"description":"status of the
